svg.title: Roadmap quality comparison: generic vs. contextualized
svg.desc: Side-by-side analysis of a generic 30-day roadmap template versus a specific Full Stack Developer roadmap, showing how context improves clarity, actionability, and followability.
svg.text: What happens when context changes everything
Concrete. You know exactly what to watch.
What if you have 1 hour? Unmotivated.
basics + 1 small project by end of Week 1"
Each requires specific tech you learned
Which projects? Two of what quality?
Did you really learn or just follow?
Ready to show employers or clients.

g.text: Context doesn't just personalize. It removes friction at every decision point:
• What should I learn today? → Generic: ??? Contextualized: "HTML5 semantic tags"
• How long should this take? → Generic: 3-4 hrs Contextualized: Adjusted to your 2 hrs
• What project should I build? → Generic: Something small Contextualized: "Portfolio website"

svg.text: The answer: Which would you follow?
You'd quit by Day 4 from decision fatigue.
Clear path. Daily target is obvious. You'd finish.
